data.title: An address associated with FTX/Alameda unstaked 185,328 SOL
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, an address associated with FTX/Alameda withdrew 185,328 SOL from the pledge, worth US$22.88 million. The wallet still has 5,502,526 SOLs pledged, worth US$682.14 million.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 550 USDT with a Narrowed 0.08% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 12, 2025, 15:41 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 550 USDT and is now trading at 548.809998 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.08% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Trump Praises Positive Inflation Data As U.S. CPI Hits New Lows
data.description:
According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed optimism regarding the latest inflation figures, describing them as very positive news. Recent data shows that the U.S. Consumer Price Index (CPI) for February recorded an unadjusted annual rate of 2.8%, marking the lowest level since November of the previous year. Additionally, the seasonally adjusted monthly CPI for February was 0.2%, the lowest since October of the prior year.

Furthermore, the unadjusted core CPI annual rate for February stood at 3.1%, the lowest since April 2021. The seasonally adjusted core CPI monthly rate was also 0.2%, reaching its lowest point since December of the previous year. These figures indicate a significant easing in inflation pressures, which has been a focal point for economic policy and analysis.

data.title: Amber DWM to Merge with iClick and Start Trading on Nasdaq Under AMBR Ticker
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: iClick Interactive Asia Group Limited (iClick), a US-listed company, announced its merger with Amber DWM Holding Limited, the holding entity of Amber Premium, the digital wealth management business of Amber Group, and obtained Nasdaq's final approval for the post-merger listing. The merged company will be renamed "Amber International Holding Limited" and will start trading on the Nasdaq Global Market with the new stock code "AMBR" from March 13, 2025. (crweworld)

data.title: LVMH in Legal Crosshairs Over NFT Smartwatch Tech
data.description:
Watch Skins Corporation has sued LVMH, alleging that TAG Heuer unlawfully used its patented NFT display technology.

The post LVMH in Legal Crosshairs Over NFT Smartwatch Tech first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/03/12/lvmh-legal-cross-hairs-nft/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=lvmh-legal-cross-hairs-nft

data.title: Insider: Tucker Carlson may have disguised himself as a lawyer to conduct a video call interview with SBF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried recently appeared on Tucker Carlson's podcast, but under normal circumstances, media interviews in U.S. federal prisons must be approved, and this interview was not approved. According to a person familiar with the matter, Tucker Carlson may have disguised himself as a lawyer to conduct a video call to bypass the approval of the prison agency and interview SBF. He may have claimed to be a legal adviser and then obtained permission for an unmonitored video visit. (Fortune)

data.title: Binance News: Binance Futures Introduces VICUSDT Perpetual Contract with Up to 75x Leverage
data.description: Key Details:Launch Time: March 12, 2025, at 17:00 (UTC)Trading Pair: VICUSDT (Viction/USDT)Maximum Leverage: 75xSettlement Asset: USDTFunding Fee Settlement: Every 4 hoursTrading Hours: 24/7Multi-Assets Mode: SupportedOverview of the VICUSDT Perpetual ContractBinance Futures has announced the launch of the VICUSDT Perpetual Contract, offering traders up to 75x leverage. This move aims to expand trading options and enhance the user experience on the platform.The initial funding rate cap will be +2.00% / -2.00%, with funding fees settled every four hours.

data.title: Trump: The latest inflation data is very good news
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said that the latest inflation data is very good news. (Jinshi)
Previous data, the US February unadjusted CPI annual rate recorded 2.8%, the lowest since November last year; the US February seasonally adjusted CPI monthly rate recorded 0.2%, the lowest since October last year.
The US February unadjusted core CPI annual rate recorded 3.1%, the lowest since April 2021; the US February seasonally adjusted core CPI monthly rate recorded 0.2%, the lowest since December last year.

data.title: MEXC Ventures Invests in Ethena and USDe to Promote Synthetic Stablecoins
data.description:
TL;DR MEXC Ventures invests $36 million in Ethena and its USDe stablecoin to accelerate the adoption of synthetic dollars within the DeFi ecosystem. USDe is a synthetic stablecoin that maintains its value through collateralizing other stablecoins and holding futures positions, differentiating itself from directly fiat-backed stablecoins. This investment strengthens Ethena’s position amid...
source: https://crypto-economy.com/mexc-ventures-invests-in-ethena-and-usde-to-promote-synthetic-stablecoins/

data.title: In the past 4 hours, the entire network has liquidated 102 million US dollars, mainly long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Coinglass data showed that in the past 4 hours, the entire network had a liquidation of 102 million US dollars, of which long positions were liquidated at 67.6825 million US dollars and short positions were liquidated at 34.5427 million US dollars.
